## Summary

- What changed and why

## Checklist

- [ ] `swift build` passes
- [ ] `swift test` passes, if tests are present
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed (`README.md` and `README.en.md`)
- [ ] No secrets/credentials included

## Testing

- Steps executed locally
- Screenshots or recordings if UI changed

## Risk and rollback

- Main risks introduced
- Rollback strategy if needed
